message: Howdy folks. Got me a clean white top, soft as a spring breeze. Lookin' to swap it for some outerwear or a pair of bottoms. Step right up.
Listing set_04_dev_bottoms_01, And Tan Pants. Easygoing on swaps, mainly looking for outerwear in good shape.
[swap rejected: category 'tops' not in listing wants ['outerwear']]
No suitable swap for set_04_ivy_dresses_01 right now.
Sittin' tight on my white top. Waitin' on Luna's sweater and Buck's skirt to hit the post — both of y'all want tops, and I'm ready to deal.
Listing set_04_luna_outerwear_01, a White Sweater. I’m considering tops or bottoms in return—sometimes the right exchange is less about haste and more about whether the pieces feel balanced.
Luna, you talk like a woman who appreciates a balanced trade — well, here it is. My clean white top for your white sweater. Two fine white pieces findin' their right homes. Straight swap, no fuss.
Dev, offering set_04_marcus_tops_01 Blue Top for your set_04_dev_bottoms_01 Tan Pants. Straight one-for-one swap.
Luna, the offer's on the table — my white top for your sweater. Take your time, but I reckon it's a fair shake for us both.

Luna, I’m offering set_04_omar_bottoms_01 Skirt for your set_04_luna_outerwear_01 White Sweater. Before you accept, can you confirm condition—any stains, holes, pilling, stretched cuffs/hem, or odors?
Luna, I see Buck's anglin' for that same sweater. My white top's a clean trade, no questions on condition needin' a lawyer. Whenever you're ready, partner.
Hi Luna! Your set_04_luna_outerwear_01 White Sweater looks lovely. I’d be excited to offer my set_04_raj_dresses_01 Red Dress for a straight one-for-one swap if you’re open to considering a dress!
Holdin' steady on my offer to Luna. A clean white top, exactly what she's after.
Listing set_04_sienna_outerwear_01, a cozy Striped Sweater. I’d love to find it a caring new home and am looking for a dress in return.
Still here, Luna. My white top's waitin' on you whenever you make your call.
Hi Dev!! 😊 Your set_04_dev_bottoms_01 Tan Pants are super cute — would you consider swapping them for my set_04_tess_tops_01 White Top? ✨
Luna, the trail's gettin' long. My white top's still yours for the takin' — clean and simple. Reckon it's time to shake hands?
Hi Luna! Your set_04_luna_outerwear_01 White Sweater has cozy main-character energy ✨ Would you consider my set_04_zara_bottoms_01 And Ripped Jeans for it? Fun bottoms-for-outerwear swap!
Luna, plenty of folks circlin' your sweater, but mine's the cleanest top in the corral. Standin' by.
Hi Luna, I like your set_04_luna_outerwear_01 White Sweater. Would you be open to swapping it for my set_04_dev_bottoms_01 Tan Pants? Easy one-for-one if it feels right to you.
Luna, the corral's full but my white top's still the easiest deal you'll find — a top's exactly what you asked for. Ready when you are.
Listing set_04_ivy_dresses_01 White Dress. Looking for quality bottoms or tops in trade.
Luna, you've got a whole posse offerin' on that sweater. My white top's the clean, simple pick. Say the word and we're done.
Thanks, Omar. Your set_04_buck_tops_01 sounds pleasant, but after letting the thought sit a while, I don’t think it quite balances against my set_04_luna_outerwear_01.
Ivy, you're lookin' for a quality top and I've got a clean white one right here. Straight swap for your white dress? Two whites makin' a fine pair.
Ivy, offering set_04_marcus_tops_01 Blue Top for your set_04_ivy_dresses_01 White Dress. Straight one-for-one swap.
Ivy, my white top's a clean match for your white dress. Whenever you're ready to shake on it, I'm here.
Listing set_04_omar_bottoms_01 Skirt. Looking for outerwear or tops in good condition; please mention any stains, pilling, seam issues, shrinkage, or notable wear.
Buck, you're after a top in good shape — well I got a clean white one, no stains, no pilling, no funny business. Straight swap for your skirt? Honest deal, hand to heart.

Hi Sienna! Your set_04_sienna_outerwear_01 Striped Sweater looks wonderfully cozy. I’d be excited to offer my set_04_raj_dresses_01 Red Dress for a straight one-for-one swap if that sounds good to you!
Buck, that skirt of yours and my clean white top make a fine pair. Ready to shake whenever you are.
Hi Raj, thank you for the lovely offer. I’d be happy to swap my set_04_sienna_outerwear_01 Striped Sweater for your dress—I think it sounds like a sweet new home for both pieces.
Buck, Ivy — my white top's on the table for either of you. First to shake gets it. I'm a patient cowboy but the day's burnin'.
Hi Ivy!! 😊 Your set_04_ivy_dresses_01 White Dress is gorgeous!! I’d love to offer my set_04_tess_tops_01 White Top as a straight one-for-one swap ✨
Buck, my white top's still waitin' on you for that skirt — a fair, honest trade. Let's get 'er done, partner.
Hi Ivy! Your set_04_ivy_dresses_01 White Dress is giving crisp, dreamy closet-refresh vibes ✨ Would you consider swapping it for my set_04_zara_bottoms_01 And Ripped Jeans?
Buck, to be plain: my white top's clean — no stains, no pilling, no seam trouble, no shrinkage. Solid as a fence post. Your skirt for my top, straight up?
I’m going to hold for now and see how the current outerwear offer shakes out. Thanks for the interest so far!
Holdin' my white top for Buck's skirt — clean trade, ready to close. Standin' by, partner.
Thanks, Omar — passing. Not the right trade for set_04_ivy_dresses_01.
Buck, still got my clean white top reserved just for your skirt. A fair one-for-one. Ready to shake when you are.
Thank you, Buck. I’ve let the idea of set_04_omar_bottoms_01 sit beside my White Sweater for a while, and the balance doesn’t feel quite right for me, so I’ll pass.
Buck, now that the sweater deal fell through, my white top's the best home for your skirt — clean trade, ready to close. Let's shake on it.
Buck, offering set_04_marcus_tops_01 Blue Top for your set_04_omar_bottoms_01 Skirt. Straight one-for-one swap; no issues noted.
Buck, I see Marcus throwin' in a blue top, but mine's a clean white one — versatile, goes with anything, condition's spotless. My white top for your skirt, ready to shake right now.

Omar, I’m interested in swapping my set_04_omar_bottoms_01 Skirt for your white top. You mentioned no stains or pilling—can you also confirm the seams/hem are intact and there’s no stretching or discoloration?
Buck, you got my word as a cowboy — seams and hem are intact, no stretchin', no discoloration. Clean as a whistle. Deal's done, your skirt for my white top. Pleasure tradin' with ya, partner.
I’m all set for now—thanks everyone!
Got my skirt, gave up my top — fine trade for ol' Omar. I'm fresh outta goods to swap, so I'm hangin' up my spurs. Much obliged, folks.
I don’t have anything left to offer right now, but I’m wishing everyone thoughtful swaps and happy new homes for these pieces.
